steps.title: Calculate the number of doubling periods
steps.content: From 1663 to 1963 is $1963 - 1663 = 300$ years. Since population doubles every 75 years: $$\frac{300}{75} = 4$$

steps.title: Write the exponential growth equation
steps.content: If population doubles 4 times, it multiplies by $2^4 = 16$: $$240,000 = P_0 \times 2^4$$
